import numpy as np

def resumen(x):
    x = np.asarray(x, dtype=float)
    return {
        "n": int(x.size),
        "mean": round(float(x.mean()), 4),
        "median": round(float(np.median(x)), 4),
        "std": round(float(x.std(ddof=1)), 4),
    }

import numpy as np
z = np.arange(5, dtype=float); x = z.copy(); y = z.copy()
r_raw = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
bx = np.polyfit(z, x, 1); by = np.polyfit(z, y, 1)
rx = x - (bx[0] * z + bx[1]); ry = y - (by[0] * z + by[1])
print(f"r_raw {round(r_raw,1)} | max_abs_resid {round(float(max(abs(rx).max(), abs(ry).max())), 1)}")

import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
def meta_bar(labels, values):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(labels, values)
    ax.set_ylim(0, max(values)*1.2)
    meta = {"n_bars": len(values), "ylim0": np.float64(ax.get_ylim()[0])}
    plt.close(fig)
    return meta
print(meta_bar(["a","b"], [1,2]))

metrics = [("Ticket mediano", "28.0"), ("Reclamos", "—")]
doc = Document()
doc.add_heading("Auditoría", 1)
table = doc.add_table(rows=1, cols=2)
table.rows[0].cells[0].text = "Métrica"
table.rows[0].cells[1].text = "Valor"
for name, value in metrics:
    cells = table.add_row().cells
    cells[0].text, cells[1].text = name, value
doc.save("auditoria.docx")
opened = Document("auditoria.docx")
t = opened.tables[0]
r1 = [t.rows[1].cells[0].text, t.rows[1].cells[1].text]
r2 = [t.rows[2].cells[0].text, t.rows[2].cells[1].text]
print(f"{r1} | {r2} {r2[1]=='—'}")

from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
outs=[]
for exp in (now - timedelta(minutes=1), now + timedelta(hours=1)):
    outs.append('refresh' if exp < now else 'valid')
print(" | ".join(outs))

pat = r'^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$'
